title: Add support for Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Copy.FollowSymlink
body:
Splitting out of #6732, in order to start the work.

The aim is to add support for: `Actions.FileAction_Copy.FollowSymlink`:

- [ ] Add AddAndCopyOptions.FollowSymlink (type: go.podman.io/image/v5/types.OptionalBool) // follow symlinks when reading globbed items, default true
- [ ] Use to set or clear copier.GetOptions.NoDerefSymlinks

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
